.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(243, 243, 195) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(224, 208, 128) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(236, 223, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(243, 243, 195) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #F3F3C3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#F3F3C3, color-mix(in srgb, #F3F3C3 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #F3F3C3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#F3F3C3, color-mix(in srgb, #F3F3C3 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(243, 243, 195) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(243, 243, 195) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(236, 223, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(243, 243, 195) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(236, 223, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(236, 223, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(236, 223, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(236, 223, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(170, 117, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(243, 243, 195) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(224, 208, 128) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(224, 208, 128) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(221, 170, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(224, 208, 128) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(224, 208, 128) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(176, 160, 80) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(176, 160, 80) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(176, 160, 80) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
